name.description: The name of the ECS service for blue/green deployment

cluster.description: The ARN of the ECS cluster to run the service on

task_definition.description: The ARN of the task definition to run; managed by CodeDeploy after initial deployment

desired_count.description: The number of instances of the task to run on the service

launch_type.description: The launch type on which to run your service (FARGATE or EC2)

platform_version.description: The Fargate platform version to run the service on

scheduling_strategy.description: The scheduling strategy to use for the service

deployment_maximum_percent.description: The upper limit of the number of running tasks that can be active during a deployment

deployment_minimum_healthy_percent.description: The lower limit of the number of running tasks that must remain healthy during a deployment

enable_ecs_managed_tags.description: Whether to enable Amazon ECS managed tags for the service

enable_execute_command.description: Whether to enable execute command for the service

health_check_grace_period_seconds.description: The period of time in seconds to ignore unhealthy load balancer health checks after a task has started

propagate_tags.description: Specifies whether to propagate the tags to the tasks (SERVICE or TASK_DEFINITION)

wait_for_steady_state.description: Whether to wait for the service to reach a steady state before proceeding

tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

load_balancer.description: A list of load balancer configuration blocks for the blue/green deployment target groups
load_balancer.type: list(object({ target_group_arn: string, container_name: string, container_port: number }))

network_configuration.description: Network configuration for the service; required for awsvpc network mode (Fargate)
network_configuration.type: list(object({ subnets: list(string), security_groups: list(string), assign_public_ip: bool }))

capacity_provider_strategy.description: A list of capacity provider strategy blocks
capacity_provider_strategy.type: list(object({ capacity_provider: string, base: number, weight: number }))

service_registries.description: A list of service registry blocks for AWS Cloud Map integration
service_registries.type: list(object({ registry_arn: string, container_name: string, container_port: number, port: number }))

timeouts.description: A map of timeouts for create, update, and delete operations
timeouts.type: object({ create: optional(string), delete: optional(string), update: optional(string) })
